name: Staff Room – Teacheron Ka Adda
overview: “Staff Room – Teacheron Ka Adda”, a unique dramedy series set in the fictitious Janaki Prakash Public School in Delhi. With a focus on emotional realism, the show highlights the challenges and situations faced by school teachers as they navigate their professional and personal lives while fulfilling their teaching responsibilities towards their students.

trailers.title: Dice Media | Staffroom | Official Trailer | Ft. Srishti Dixit & Apara Mehta
